case_title: BRIAN AMIDZICH VS. WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC.et al

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2009 RE-ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON MAR-11-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, JUDGE CHAN. (206)
MINUTES FOR MAR-11-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 514

TRIAL DE NOVO ON SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO JUDGE BRUCE CHAN ON MAR-11-2009. THE COURT, HAVING CONFERRED WITH THE PARTIES, THE TRIAL DE NOVO ON SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL IS CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 514 FOR STATUS REPORT AND TO SET. JUDGE BRUCE CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 514)
MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT ON MAR-19-2009. THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT WERE FULLY RECITED ON THE RECORD BY RESPONDENTS' COUNSEL, JOSEPH BRAVO. AS PART OF THE SETTLEMENT THE APPELLANT, JOHN R. MONTGOMERY OF WEST GROUP REAL STATE, INC., WILL WITHDRAW THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WILL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, COURT REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN CSR #11722 (DEPT. 514)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2008 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO OCT-10-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD JOHN MONTGOMERY, JR. AS A PARTY DEFENDANT. IF DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY DOES NOT ACCEPT OR WAIVE SERVICE OF THE AMENDED CLAIM, PLAINTIFF SHALL COMPLETE TIMELY SERVICE PRIOR TO OCTOBER 10, 2008 TRIAL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMIDZICH, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST GROUP REAL ESTATE, INC. MONTGOMERY JR, JOHN $7,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $2.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,252.50, CLAIM CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE # 825909. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
